ddls:
CREATE TABLE "blends" (
  "blend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coffee blend */,
  "blend_name" TEXT /* Name of the coffee blend */,
  "blend_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the blend type (e.g., Balkan, English) */,
  "fav_count" INTEGER /* Number of times this blend has been marked as a favorite */,
  "blend_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the blend */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Geographical origin of the coffee beans */,
  "roast_date" TEXT /* Date when the blend was roasted */,
  "roaster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the roaster who created the blend */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the blend */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the blend */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Whether the blend is currently available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blends_blend_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("blend_type_id") REFERENCES blend_types ("blend_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blends_roaster_id FOREIGN KEY ("roaster_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blend_types" (
  "blend_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blend type */,
  "blend_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the blend type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the blend type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent blend type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the blend type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the blend type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blend_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "blend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee blend being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title for the review */,
  "recommendation" INTEGER /* Whether the user recommends the blend */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Date when the review was last updated */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Whether the review is from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_blend_id FOREIGN KEY ("blend_id") REFERENCES blends ("blend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, staff) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "blend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee blend being rated */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the blend */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews received for this blend */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_blend_id FOREIGN KEY ("blend_id") REFERENCES blends ("blend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite record */,
  "blend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee blend marked as favorite */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who marked the blend as favorite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the blend was marked as a favorite */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the favorite status is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_blend_id FOREIGN KEY ("blend_id") REFERENCES blends ("blend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotional campaign */,
  "blend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee blend being promoted */,
  "promo_description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage for the promotion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the promotion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the promotion was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the promotion is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_blend_id FOREIGN KEY ("blend_id") REFERENCES blends ("blend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the order */,
  "blend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee blend ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the blend ordered */,
  "order_total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_blend_id FOREIGN KEY ("blend_id") REFERENCES blends ("blend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "blend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee blend */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the blend */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the blend was last restocked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was last updated */,
  "next_restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the next restock is expected */,
  "is_low_stock_alert" INTEGER /* Whether a low stock alert should be triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_blend_id FOREIGN KEY ("blend_id") REFERENCES blends ("blend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "blend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coffee blend being analyzed */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the blend */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the blend from reviews */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the analytics record was last updated */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the blend */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders for the blend */,
  "total_favorites" INTEGER /* Total number of times the blend has been marked as a favorite */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* A calculated score based on various popularity metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_blend_id FOREIGN KEY ("blend_id") REFERENCES blends ("blend_id")
)
